role: Angiotensinogen -- the ligand/substrate; cleaved by renin to Ang I
Renin -- canonical rate-limiting protease (AGT -> Ang I)
Chymase -- renin-independent Ang II generation (mast cells)
Cathepsin G -- alternative Ang II route (mast/neutrophil)
AT1R -- the pericyte receptor of interest
Top-ranked pericyte ligand; the established niche signal
